product_updates.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
product_updates.content: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

product_updates.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
product_updates.content: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

product_updates.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
product_updates.content: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

product_updates.title: Apple’s new CEO, and why Elon Musk wants to buy Cursor for $60B
product_updates.content: A new era is on the way for Apple as Tim Cook plans to step down from his CEO role in September, handing the reins to hardware chief John Ternus. Ternus may be inheriting one of the most durable businesses in tech, but he’s also stepping into a very different ecosystem than the one Cook spent dec…

product_updates.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
product_updates.content: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

product_updates.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
product_updates.content: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga will join the rest of the lineup to discuss…

product_updates.title: Tim Cook is stepping down. What happens to Apple now?
product_updates.content: Tim Cook plans to step down from his CEO role in September, handing the reins to hardware chief John Ternus. Ternus may be inheriting one of the most durable businesses in tech, but he’s also stepping into a very different ecosystemthan the one Cook spent decades shaping. The App Store’s 30% cut …

product_updates.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
product_updates.content: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

product_updates.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
product_updates.content: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

product_updates.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
product_updates.content: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
technical_breakthroughs.content: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 i…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Why are top university websites serving porn? It comes down to shoddy housekeeping.
technical_breakthroughs.content: Hundreds of subdomains from dozens of universities have been hijacked by scammers.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: supercharged scams and studying AI healthcare
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
technical_breakthroughs.content: I don’t need to tell you that AI is everywhere. Or that it is being used, increasingly, in hospitals. Doctors are using AI to help them with notetaking. AI-based tools are trawling through patient records, flagging people who may require certain support or treatments. They are also used to interp…
